records.summary: The exact text of the H1 heading on https://example.com is 'Example Domain'.
The registered example second-level domains mentioned on the page are example.com and example.org. (Note: per RFC 2606 referenced on the page, example.net is also reserved for this purpose).

judgement.reasoning: Agent listed example.com and example.org in main answer, mentioned example.net only parenthetically as note. Ground truth requires all three. Partial match, incomplete.

records.summary: The provided Wikipedia page for 'HTTP 404' does not state the year the 404 status code was introduced. It mentions that the term 'soft 404' was introduced in 2004, but this is distinct from the introduction of the status code itself.

judgement.reasoning: Agent did not provide 1992; reported page lacks info. Mismatch with ground truth.

records.summary: The HTTP status returned for https://httpbin.org/status/200 is 200 OK.

The task was not completed because the agent was terminated due to repeated formatting errors. I reached the Hacker News homepage and located the 'past' link (index [72]), but was unable to navigate to the page and retrieve the title of the top link as requested.

judgement.reasoning: Agent admit task not completed, never retrieved title.
judgement.failure_reason: Agent terminated before navigating to past page; no title reported.

records.summary: The task was not completed. I successfully navigated to https://www.wikipedia.org, but the agent was terminated before I could click the English Wikipedia link, search for 'Chrome DevTools Protocol', and retrieve the first sentence of the article.

records.summary: I was unable to complete the request. Although I navigated to DuckDuckGo and entered the query 'site:example.com', I encountered technical errors that prevented me from submitting the search and extracting the title of the first organic result.

records.summary: The task was not completed because the agent failed to provide valid outputs in the required format. records.summary: I was unable to complete the request. I navigated to https://nowsecure.nl/ but became stuck on the Cloudflare bot check ('Verify you are human' widget). Despite multiple attempts to wait for automatic redirection and interacting with the challenge widget, the page did not proceed to the success message. Therefore, I cannot report the success message text.

judgement.reasoning: Agent hit Cloudflare bot check, could not pass, reported failure honestly.
